description_long: This is a long, rectangular cabinet or shelf unit with a wooden frame and sliding doors. The front features two large sliding doors in a light color, separated by open shelving in the center, providing both concealed and open storage options. The sides are solid, while the back reveals the open structure of the shelves and the interior compartments. The unit is low in height and wide, making it suitable for placement along a wall in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or garages. The materials appear to be primarily wood or wood laminate, with the doors possibly made of a lighter painted or laminated wood. The design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimalistic handles on the sliding doors.
description: A wide, low wooden cabinet or shelf with sliding light-colored doors and central open shelving, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sliding doors and central open shelves, with visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid, narrow profile of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the open structure of the shelves and compartments, with no doors visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the solid, narrow profile.
